name: Repost-with-agent
description: Agent-driven, browser-based reposting (v3.0.0). The CLI is a thin orchestrator over JSON state; the agent (Claude Code via chrome-devtools-mcp, OpenClaw via its built-in browser tool) drives the user's logged-in browser to do the actual cross-posting. No API SDKs, no Playwright. Supports LinkedIn, X, Bluesky, Threads, Facebook. NON-NEGOTIABLE RULE: every successful publish MUST Telegram-confirm to Ethan with source + destination URL via `notify configure`. Silent publishes are a bug. See CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / README §3.
